rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. RICHARD KIWATA

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 24, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA BY AND Notice Of Motion For Appointment Of Receiver GRANTED as requested. Attorney's fees granted in the amount of $24,000 (reasonable hours [80] at reasonable rate [$300/hour] for the work performed). =(501/CFH)
